evidence.snippet: Linear and rotary, brushed and brushless actuator designs for aerospace & defense applications, including flaps, trim, cabin / cargo doors, valves and anti-ice

items.notes: Linear and rotary actuators for aerospace/defense including UAV flaps, trim, valves, canopy.

evidence.snippet:
*   RF amplifier modules: 80 kHz - 3,000 MHz, 5 - 500 watts broadband, narrowband and custom designs
*   Rack-mount amplifier systems: 80 kHz - 3,000 MHz, 5 - 1,000 watts
*   Booster amplifiers for tactical military radios: 30 MHz - 3 GHz, 20 - 125 watts

items.notes: AR Modular RF brand: RF booster amplifiers for tactical military radios, rack-mount amplifiers, amplifier modules; fitted to UAVs.

evidence.snippet: AR modular designs and manufacturers RF amplifier modules and broadband solid-state amplifier systems that play a critical role in wireless and radio communications, military communications, electronic warfare, electronic countermeasures, homeland security, as well as a variety of medical, scientific, and industrial applications.

items.notes: AR Modular RF amplifiers explicitly listed as serving electronic warfare and electronic countermeasures applications.

products_categories.notes: Primary business is aerospace/defense power systems supplier. RF amplifiers secondary line includes EW/ECM applications per homepage.

evidence.snippet: Designed and manufactured in our Wichita, KS location, we offer both commercial-off-the shelf (COTS) designs and completely custom engineered solutions to meet our customers timeframe and specification requirements.
AMETEK PDS, a division of AMETEK Inc.

headquarters.notes: Locations page states 'Headquartered in the USA' but that line exceeds citation word cap; actuators page confirms Wichita KS as a primary design/manufacturing location; AMETEK PDS is a division of AMETEK Inc. (US). Wichita KS as city is inferred from manufacturing mention, not explicit corporate HQ designation.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures components (power systems, motors, actuators, RF amplifiers, data converters) supplied to UAV/UAS program managers including Lockheed Martin, Aurora, and Turkish Aerospace.

tagline: Manufactures DC power generation and distribution units, RF amplifiers (30–512 MHz tactical boosters), electric motors, actuators, and avionics for aerospace and defense platforms including UAVs. In-production component supplier across power systems, communications, and propulsion. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence thin on specific unmanned-systems contracts or program wins.
